title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at RBI

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at RBI
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!
